units.source_text: 公允值須符合監控架構的規定，設立架構是為了確保公允值由獨立於承受風險部⾨以外的部⾨釐定或驗證。
units.translation_target_text: Fair values must comply with the requirements of a control structure established to ensure that fair values are determined or verified by a department independent of the risk-bearing department.
units.translation_en: Fair values must comply with the requirements of a control structure established to ensure that fair values are determined or verified by a department independent of the risk-bearing department.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Fair values must comply with the requirements of a control structure established to ensure that fair values are determined or verified by a department independent of the risk-bearing department.

units.source_text: 若為參考外界報價或模型可觀察訂價數據⽽釐定的公允值，則會獨立釐定或驗證有關價格。在交投不活躍的市場，滙豐會尋找其他市場資料，並會
units.translation_target_text: If the fair value is determined with reference to external quoted prices or model-observable pricing data, the relevant price will be determined or verified independently. In inactive markets, HSBC will seek other market information and will
units.translation_en: If the fair value is determined with reference to external quoted prices or model-observable pricing data, the relevant price will be determined or verified independently. In inactive markets, HSBC will seek other market information and will

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: If the fair value is determined with reference to external quoted prices or model-observable pricing data, the relevant price will be determined or verified independently. In inactive markets, HSBC will seek other market information and will

units.source_text: 較注重被認為較有關連及較為可靠的資料。考慮因素包括價格的可觀察性、⼯具的可比較性、數據來源的⼀致性、相關數據的準確性及訂價的時
units.translation_target_text: Pay more attention to information that is considered more relevant and reliable. Considerations include observability of prices, comparability of instruments, consistency of data sources, accuracy of relevant data and timing of pricing
units.translation_en: Pay more attention to information that is considered more relevant and reliable. Considerations include observability of prices, comparability of instruments, consistency of data sources, accuracy of relevant data and timing of pricing

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Pay more attention to information that is considered more relevant and reliable. Considerations include observability of prices, comparability of instruments, consistency of data sources, accuracy of relevant data and timing of pricing

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: ⾄於以估值模型釐定的公允值，其監控架構包括由獨立後勤部⾨制訂或驗證模型所⽤邏輯、數據、模型推算結果及調整。估值模型須經盡職審查程
units.translation_target_text: As for the fair value determined by the valuation model, its control structure includes the logic, data, model projection results and adjustments used by independent logistics departments to develop or verify the model. Valuation models are subject to a due diligence process
units.translation_en: As for the fair value determined by the valuation model, its control structure includes the logic, data, model projection results and adjustments used by independent logistics departments to develop or verify the model. Valuation models are subject to a due diligence process

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: As for the fair value determined by the valuation model, its control structure includes the logic, data, model projection results and adjustments used by independent logistics departments to develop or verify the model. Valuation models are subject to a due diligence process

units.source_text: 序⽅可採⽤，並會持續根據外界市場數據校準。倘主要產品估值模型未有納入其他因素，便會套⽤公允值調整。
units.translation_target_text: The order can only be adopted and will be continuously calibrated based on external market data. Fair value adjustments are applied when no other factors are incorporated into the primary product valuation model.
units.translation_en: The order can only be adopted and will be continuously calibrated based on external market data. Fair value adjustments are applied when no other factors are incorporated into the primary product valuation model.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The order can only be adopted and will be continuously calibrated based on external market data. Fair value adjustments are applied when no other factors are incorporated into the primary product valuation model.

units.source_text: ⼤部分按公允值計量的⾦融⼯具均來⾃資本市場及證券服務業務。資本市場及證券服務業務的公允值管治架構包括其財務部及多個估值委員會。財
units.translation_target_text: Most of the financial instruments measured at fair value are derived from capital markets and securities services businesses. The fair value governance structure of the capital markets and securities services business includes its finance department and various valuation committees. wealth
units.translation_en: Most of the financial instruments measured at fair value are derived from capital markets and securities services businesses. The fair value governance structure of the capital markets and securities services business includes its finance department and various valuation committees. wealth

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Most of the financial instruments measured at fair value are derived from capital markets and securities services businesses. The fair value governance structure of the capital markets and securities services business includes its finance department and various valuation committees. wealth

units.source_text: 務部負責制訂規管估值的程序及確保公允值符合相關會計準則。公允值由估值委員會（成員包括獨立後勤部⾨）審閱。
units.translation_target_text: The Finance Department is responsible for formulating procedures for regulating valuations and ensuring that fair values comply with relevant accounting standards. The fair value is reviewed by the Valuation Committee, whose members include the independent backend department.
units.translation_en: The Finance Department is responsible for formulating procedures for regulating valuations and ensuring that fair values comply with relevant accounting standards. The fair value is reviewed by the Valuation Committee, whose members include the independent backend department.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The Finance Department is responsible for formulating procedures for regulating valuations and ensuring that fair values comply with relevant accounting standards. The fair value is reviewed by the Valuation Committee, whose members include the independent backend department.

units.source_text: 按公允值計量之⾦融負債

units.translation_en: Financial liabilities measured at fair value

units.source_text: 於若⼲情況下，滙豐會按公允值將已發⾏的本⾝債務入賬，⽽相關公允值則根據有關特定⼯具於交投活躍市場的報價釐定。如缺乏市場報價，則會
units.translation_target_text: In certain circumstances, HSBC will record its own debt issued at fair value, which is determined based on quoted prices in active markets for the specific instrument. If there is a lack of market quotation, it will
units.translation_en: In certain circumstances, HSBC will record its own debt issued at fair value, which is determined based on quoted prices in active markets for the specific instrument. If there is a lack of market quotation, it will

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: In certain circumstances, HSBC will record its own debt issued at fair value, which is determined based on quoted prices in active markets for the specific instrument. If there is a lack of market quotation, it will

units.source_text: 使⽤估值⽅法估算已發⾏本⾝債務的價值，估值採⽤的輸入數據會以該⼯具於交投不活躍市場的報價為依據，或透過與近似⼯具於交投活躍市場的
units.translation_target_text: Use valuation methods to estimate the value of issued own debt. The input data used in the valuation will be based on the quoted price of the instrument in an inactive market, or through the price of a similar instrument in an active market.
units.translation_en: Use valuation methods to estimate the value of issued own debt. The input data used in the valuation will be based on the quoted price of the instrument in an inactive market, or through the price of a similar instrument in an active market.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Use valuation methods to estimate the value of issued own debt. The input data used in the valuation will be based on the quoted price of the instrument in an inactive market, or through the price of a similar instrument in an active market.

units.source_text: 報價作比較⽽估計。於此兩種情況下，公允值均會包含適⽤於滙豐負債的信貸息差之影響。因集團本⾝信貸息差令已發⾏債務證券公允值產⽣的變
units.translation_target_text: Quotes are compared and estimated. In both cases, the fair value will include the impact of the credit spread applicable to HSBC's liabilities. Changes in the fair value of debt securities issued due to the Group’s own credit spreads
units.translation_en: Quotes are compared and estimated. In both cases, the fair value will include the impact of the credit spread applicable to HSBC's liabilities. Changes in the fair value of debt securities issued due to the Group’s own credit spreads

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Quotes are compared and estimated. In both cases, the fair value will include the impact of the credit spread applicable to HSBC's liabilities. Changes in the fair value of debt securities issued due to the Group’s own credit spreads

units.source_text: 動，乃按下列⽅式計算：於每個業績報告⽇期由外間取得每項證券的可核證價格，或以同⼀發⾏⼈的類似證券之信貸息差計算價格。然後，集團會
units.translation_target_text: Movement is calculated by obtaining an externally verifiable price for each security at each performance reporting date or by using the credit spread on similar securities of the same issuer. Then, the group will
units.translation_en: Movement is calculated by obtaining an externally verifiable price for each security at each performance reporting date or by using the credit spread on similar securities of the same issuer. Then, the group will

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Movement is calculated by obtaining an externally verifiable price for each security at each performance reporting date or by using the credit spread on similar securities of the same issuer. Then, the group will

units.source_text: 採⽤現⾦流折現法，採⽤適當市場折現曲線為每項證券估值。估值之間的差異乃源⾃集團本⾝的信貸息差。所有證券均⼀致採⽤這⽅法計算。
units.translation_target_text: Using the discounted cash flow method, each security is valued using an appropriate market discount curve. The difference between the valuations is due to the Group's own credit spreads. This method is used consistently for all securities.
units.translation_en: Using the discounted cash flow method, each security is valued using an appropriate market discount curve. The difference between the valuations is due to the Group's own credit spreads. This method is used consistently for all securities.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Using the discounted cash flow method, each security is valued using an appropriate market discount curve. The difference between the valuations is due to the Group's own credit spreads. This method is used consistently for all securities.

units.source_text: 已發⾏結構性票據及若⼲其他混合⼯具均呈列為指定按公允值列賬之⾦融負債。應⽤於該等⼯具的信貸息差源⾃滙豐發⾏結構性票據時採⽤的息
units.translation_target_text: The structured notes issued and certain other hybrid instruments are presented as financial liabilities designated at fair value. The credit spreads applied to these instruments are derived from the interest rates used by HSBC when issuing structured notes.
units.translation_en: The structured notes issued and certain other hybrid instruments are presented as financial liabilities designated at fair value. The credit spreads applied to these instruments are derived from the interest rates used by HSBC when issuing structured notes.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The structured notes issued and certain other hybrid instruments are presented as financial liabilities designated at fair value. The credit spreads applied to these instruments are derived from the interest rates used by HSBC when issuing structured notes.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 假若該等債務並非按溢價或折讓償還，因滙豐發⾏負債之信貸息差變動⽽產⽣並計入其他全⾯收益的損益，將於債務合約期限內撥回。
units.translation_target_text: If the debts are not repaid at a premium or discount, gains and losses arising from changes in the credit spreads on the liabilities issued by HSBC and included in other comprehensive income will be reversed over the term of the debt contracts.
units.translation_en: If the debts are not repaid at a premium or discount, gains and losses arising from changes in the credit spreads on the liabilities issued by HSBC and included in other comprehensive income will be reversed over the term of the debt contracts.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: If the debts are not repaid at a premium or discount, gains and losses arising from changes in the credit spreads on the liabilities issued by HSBC and included in other comprehensive income will be reversed over the term of the debt contracts.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: ⾦融資產及負債的公允值根據以下等級制釐定：
units.translation_target_text: The fair value of financial assets and liabilities is determined based on the following hierarchy:
units.translation_en: The fair value of financial assets and liabilities is determined based on the following hierarchy:

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The fair value of financial assets and liabilities is determined based on the following hierarchy:

units.source_text: 第⼀級 — 採⽤市場報價的估值⽅法。有關⾦融⼯具在計量⽇期有相同⼯具於滙豐可參與之交投活躍市場報價。
units.translation_target_text: Level 1 - Valuation method using market quotations. The relevant financial instruments have quoted prices on active markets in which HSBC participates for identical instruments on the measurement date.
units.translation_en: Level 1 - Valuation method using market quotations. The relevant financial instruments have quoted prices on active markets in which HSBC participates for identical instruments on the measurement date.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Level 1 - Valuation method using market quotations. The relevant financial instruments have quoted prices on active markets in which HSBC participates for identical instruments on the measurement date.

units.source_text: 第⼆級 — 採⽤可觀察數據的估值⽅法。有關⾦融⼯具有類似⼯具於交投活躍市場報價或有相同或類似⼯具於交投不活躍市場報價，並使⽤所有
units.translation_target_text: Level 2 – Valuation methods using observable data. The relevant financial instrument has a quotation for a similar instrument in an active market or an identical or similar instrument has a quotation for an inactive market, and uses all
units.translation_en: Level 2 – Valuation methods using observable data. The relevant financial instrument has a quotation for a similar instrument in an active market or an identical or similar instrument has a quotation for an inactive market, and uses all

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Level 2 – Valuation methods using observable data. The relevant financial instrument has a quotation for a similar instrument in an active market or an identical or similar instrument has a quotation for an inactive market, and uses all

units.source_text: 重⼤數據均屬可觀察的模型對該等⾦融⼯具進⾏估值。
units.translation_target_text: All significant data are observable and the financial instruments are valued using models.
units.translation_en: All significant data are observable and the financial instruments are valued using models.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: All significant data are observable and the financial instruments are valued using models.

units.source_text: 第三級 — 採⽤涉及重⼤不可觀察數據的估值⽅法。有關⾦融⼯具運⽤涉及⼀項或多項重⼤不可觀察數據之估值⽅法進⾏估值。
units.translation_target_text: Level 3 – Use valuation methods that involve significant unobservable data. The financial instruments are valued using valuation methods that involve one or more significant unobservable data.
units.translation_en: Level 3 – Use valuation methods that involve significant unobservable data. The financial instruments are valued using valuation methods that involve one or more significant unobservable data.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Level 3 – Use valuation methods that involve significant unobservable data. The financial instruments are valued using valuation methods that involve one or more significant unobservable data.
